productDisplayName: Scullers Men Scul White Black Shirt
description: CompositionBlack and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, with full sleeves, full length buttoned placket with metal buttons, patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps, with embroidered brand name over the left chest pocket, brand badge over the right sleeve  and a curved hemlineFittingRelaxedWash care Pre-soak the garment before wash Wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened Preferably hand washed Use only mild detergents Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing Flat dry Preferably steam iron This black and white check shirt from scullers is a great addition to your wardrobe.  The black and white combo and the metal buttons gives off an energetic vibe. Pair this shirt with denims or chinos and semi-formal leather shoes for a cool casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2', Shoulders-17.5"
